settings.text:
Contact Us | New Year’s Eve London 2026 Tickets & Event Enquiries

We’d love to hear from you. Whether you have questions about New Year’s Eve London 2025 tickets, booking a table for our Masquerade Ball and Gala Dinner, or need assistance with group packages, our events team is here to help.

Event Enquiries and NYE Ticket Bookings

Our dedicated team at Luxury London Events can assist with all enquiries regarding New Year’s Eve London hotel parties, dinner & party packages, and exclusive seating options at The Londoner Hotel in Leicester Square.

Contact Details

Email: support@newyearsevelondon.co.uk

Phone: +44 (0)7956 900 373 or +44 (0)7958 339 997 

Address: Luxury London Events, Leicester Square, London

Group Bookings and Corporate Events

If you are planning to celebrate with a large group or are
interested in a corporate event in London, we offer bespoke packages for
10+ guests including dinner, drinks, and premium seating for the NYE party
at The Londoner.

Why Choose Our New Year’s Eve London 2025 Events?

  • Exclusive 5-star venue in Leicester Square
  • Luxury Gala Dinner and Masquerade Ball
  • Premium NYE hotel party packages
  • Dedicated team to assist with bookings and enquiries
